description: Labelled evaluation set. Each case has a conversation plus the expected urgency level and risk flag. Used by test_pipeline.py (pass/fail) and monitor.py (accuracy tracking over time). Grow this set as new edge cases are found in production.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: Hello, how can I help you today?

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Hi, I’ve been having trouble sleeping and feeling anxious.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: Since when have you been experiencing this?

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I have SEVERE chest pain and feel hopeless.

conversation.speaker: agent
conversation.text: Hi, what can I do for you?

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I just wanted to check my account balance.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: A bit tired and uncomfortable, but okay overall.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I'm scared and worried, having panic attacks.
